Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Text Ruling

Appearances:
Atty. Bret A. Baillio of Maxwell & Morgan P.C., Tel. No. 1-480-833-1001 ext. 219
appearing for thwe Plaintiff by Telephone appearance;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Tapestry on Central Condominium Association's motion for attorneys' fees and costs is granted. No opposition filed.
Order signed in open court. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
B. Austin Baillio, Esq. of Maxwell & Morgan PC, T:480.833.1001, for judgment creditor/moving party;
Victoria Boyko [sued as Vika Boyko], T:415.950.7739, judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: Ms. Boyko's capacity to pay the judgment was discussed. After reviewing the papers and hearing the parties' arguments, the Court ruled on PLAINTIFF TAPESTRY ON CENTRAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's HEARING ON the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Vika Boyko as follows:

Judgment Debtor/Claimant Vika Boyko's Claim of Exemption is granted in part. The levying officer shall withhold $215.00 per pay period as payment for the judgment. The levying officer is also directed to release all earnings held to the judgment debtor.

The court will prepare the order and serve it on all parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF TAPESTRY ON CENTRAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is CONTINUED to April 11, 2018 per the request of all parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
